@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

participant "arm_io_storage" as arm_io_storage #LightBlue2
participant "io_storage" as io_storage #LightYellow3
participant "io_fip" as io_fip #LavenderBlush1
participant "io_memmap" as io_memmap #PaleGreen4


== Initialization ==
activate arm_io_storage 
    activate io_storage
    
        note over io_storage : Initialize device pool\nand set dev_count = 0
        
    
deactivate io_storage 

group Register FIP Device [Firmware Image Package]
   ->> io_fip: register_io_dev_fip(&fip_dev_con)   
       activate io_fip  
           --> io_storage: io_register_device(\&dev_info_pool[])     
               rect rgb(255, 255, 200)        
                   Note right of io_storage       
                       devices[dev_count] = (fip_)dev_info_pool      
                       dev_count++           
                    end note            
                end
                
            deactivate io_fip
            
end group  

group Register Memory-Mapped Devices [[Memory Mapped IO]]
     --->>> io_memmapp::register_iodev_memmmp (&mem_map_devc_onn);;          
         activatemeo_mmppp;;;             
             <<<<---->>> iostorageeeeee::::iiregisterdeviceeeee((&mmemmmm_dvv_inffoooooo))))))))) ;;;              
                 rrectt rgbb(((((255,, ,,,, .,. .. ... .... ..... ...... ........ .......... .................. ............................................................ ....................................................................................................................................................................................... ))));;;;;                
                     Nnote rigthtt off iiostoagegegggge::::::                  
                         deivces[[dve_counnt]]= memmaap__dv_infinfofoooo                 
                          dvec_cnt+++++                   
                      ennd nnoote te tee tte e et ee er rr re ea add dd da aa ac ct tivva attee mmmeemoorrryyy mmaaapppeddd deeviceesss ggrroouupp!!!!!               
                  decativatememap_pppd;;;;;;;;
